$meta.name: tahoe-liquid-glass-ubuntu tokens
$meta.purpose: Single machine-readable source of truth. Theme, KWin effect, and configs all read from here.
$meta.substrate: KDE Plasma 6 + custom KWin OpenGL effect (pixel-parity Liquid Glass is compositor-level)
$meta.provenance: apple = Apple-documented/design-figure; measured = our screenshot measurement @2x; derived = computed via the concentric rule; estimate = reconstruction; figma-community = exact from the 'macOS 26 (Community)' Figma kit (expert reproduction, NOT Apple-official) — see parity/figma-extract.md
$meta.note: Apple deliberately does NOT publish most pixel values (WWDC310: use Auto Layout). Numbers here are measured or Apple-figure; the RULES are the corpus payload.
$meta.units: pt = logical points (~2px @2x retina); px = physical pixels

corner.style.note: squircle profile (.continuous), not a plain rounded rect

squircle.heightField.note: Apple refraction/corner curve; drop into the shader displacement

squircle.exponent.note: superellipse approximation; true corner is Bezier (figma-squircle path for exact)

shape.types.note: WWDC356 — the geometry Apple DOES publish

concentricity.rule.note: nested radii derive from container; far-from-edge corners -> 0

button.medium.note: rounded rect, corner ~4-5pt; taller than classic 21pt

control.minSize.note: HIG a11y: 28x28 default / 20x20 min visual (hit target still 44)

slider.thumb.note: no ticks (25 with ticks); round thumb 15

tint.prominence.note: tint the BACKGROUND never the label; destructive = red @ secondary

menuBar.height.note: Tahoe; Apple HIG nominal 24pt; Sequoia was 25px

sheet.cornerRadius.note: macOS 26 kit Sheet/Dialog/Alert body = r26 (our screenshot measure said ~20; kit says 26)

glass.sampleRadius.note: Liquid Glass medium/large 160pt sample; small element = capsule

tint.light.note: vibrancy tiers, tint #F6F6F6 + 30px backdrop blur (macOS 26 kit)

tint.dark.note: dark vibrancy tiers, tint #000000 + 30px backdrop blur

variants.note: Regular = adaptive default; Clear = transparent, media-rich only

clear.dimming.note: dark layer over BRIGHT media only (localized for small footprints)

vibrancy.blend.note: keep fg lightness, pull hue/sat from backdrop; labels 4 / fills 3 / separators 1

adaptiveInk.flip.note: SMALL elements flip as a unit; LARGE elements (menus/sidebars) mute, never flip

glass.morphSpacing.note: shapes blend when edges within container spacing

glass.figma.note: Figma native Glass effect, CONSTANT across sizes (macOS 26 kit; REST API hides these, read from canvas). Map: refraction->IOR bend, depth->thickness, dispersion->chromatic aberration, splay->edge spread, light->specular angle/intensity

glass.frost.note: backdrop blur radius; the ONLY glass param that scales with element size (control/panel/window)

glass.tint.medium.note: Liquid Glass Medium/Light tint stack; glass-layer fill #000@20%; element shadow 0/8/40 #000@12%

glass.ior.note: shader refract() IOR; tune so lensing reads like Figma refraction=100

glass.chromatic.note: keep subtle; Figma dispersion=0 in this kit

blur.sigma.note: material backdrop blur, constant across vibrancy tiers; glass FROST (7/12/14) is a separate, size-scaled blur

dynamic.note: opacity up over text, down over solid light bg; recede on unfocus. Bake TWO states.

system.note: exact from macOS 26 kit; format: x y blur spread color. Two-layer = ambient + contour

topEdge.highlight.note: popover top-edge inner highlight (kit value; was estimate 0.6)

elevation.model.note: SIZE + modality drive depth; no dp scale

shadow.source: figma-community: exact layers from the macOS 26 kit. Apple-official Figma kit would confirm/refine.

radius.note: Big Sur baseline; Tahoe rounder + enforced, exact % unpublished

feasibility.note: NOT themeable; Shell/KWin do easing curves (Back/Elastic)

liquidGlass.motion.value: morph/gel, thicker-on-scale, velocity handoff; materialize NOT fade

selection.fill.note: light sidebar selection, deeper than tint

focusRing.note: macOS 26 kit: DOUBLE ring 3.5px @25% + 1px @15%, color = accent #007AFF (was est. #0a84ff)

destructive.note: distinct from palette Red; @ secondary prominence

dark.selection.note: semantic base -> rendered through dark glass

rules: ONE glass plane only: a single floating functional layer over content. Never glass-on-glass (glass can't sample glass). Never glass in the content layer.
Regular is the default variant everywhere; Clear only over rich media, and only with a 35% dark dim over bright content.
Concentric nesting: window 16/20/26 -> card 9 -> control; inner radius = parent - padding.
Tint the BACKGROUND, never text/symbols. One emphasis per context. Color lives in the content layer.
Small elements + their symbols flip light<->dark @ Y~0.36; large elements (menus/sidebars) mute but never flip.
Materialize by modulating lensing, not opacity. Larger glass = thicker (deeper shadow, more lensing). Losing focus recedes.
Menu-bar order: App | File | Edit | Format | View | [app] | Window | Help. Toolbar 3 zones (leading fixed / center overflow / trailing pinned + one prominent). <=3 groups.
Sidebars float, extend content beneath (background-extension), more opaque at large size. Tab bars = navigation only.
Reduce custom backgrounds/tints so system glass + scroll-edge drive color.

Accessibility overrides the optics: Reduce Transparency -> frost; Increase Contrast -> B/W + border (no flip); Reduce Motion -> tighten springs, kill z-depth, transitions->fades. Glass is NEVER load-bearing for legibility.
Authentic Apple wins: mirror pixel-for-pixel; where there's no Apple element, don't invent one. Restraint is the aesthetic.
